mapper.select: SELECT CASE status WHEN 'RESCUED_PENDING_REVIEW' THEN '待审核救助' WHEN 'UNDER_RESCUE' THEN '救助中' WHEN 'RESCUE_REJECTED' THEN '救助驳回' WHEN 'OPEN_FOR_ADOPTION' THEN '开放领养中' WHEN 'APPLICATION_REVIEW' THEN '领养申请审核中' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '领养审核通过' WHEN 'FOLLOWUP_PENDING' THEN '待回访' WHEN 'ADOPTION_COMPLETED' THEN '领养完成' WHEN 'FOLLOWUP_EXCEPTION' THEN '回访异常' WHEN 'RETURNED_TO_CENTER' THEN '退养返站' ELSE status END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM animal GROUP BY status ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT id, animal_no, name, category, breed, age_desc, gender, CASE status WHEN 'OPEN_FOR_ADOPTION' THEN '开放领养中' WHEN 'APPLICATION_REVIEW' THEN '申请审核中' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已通过待回访' WHEN 'FOLLOWUP_PENDING' THEN '待回访' WHEN 'ADOPTION_COMPLETED' THEN '已完成领养' ELSE status END AS status, found_location, cover_image FROM animal WHERE status IN ('OPEN_FOR_ADOPTION', 'APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'APPROVED', 'FOLLOWUP_PENDING', 'ADOPTION_COMPLETED') ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT rr.id, a.name AS animalName, a.category, a.gender, u.real_name AS volunteerName, rr.found_location, rr.found_time, CASE rr.audit_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' ELSE rr.audit_status END AS audit_status, rr.audit_remark FROM rescue_record rr LEFT JOIN animal a ON a.id = rr.animal_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = rr.volunteer_user_id ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC

SELECT aa.id, a.name AS animalName, a.id AS animalId, su.real_name AS applicantName, su.id AS applicantUserId, su.gender AS applicantGender, su.phone AS applicantPhone, aa.apply_reason, aa.housing_info, aa.family_info, aa.pet_experience, CASE aa.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' WHEN 'SUPPLEMENT' THEN '待补充资料' ELSE aa.status END AS status, aa.audit_remark, aa.create_time FROM adoption_application aa LEFT JOIN animal a ON a.id = aa.animal_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = aa.applicant_user_id ORDER BY aa.create_time DESC

SELECT a.name AS animalName, a.category, a.gender, CASE rr.audit_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' ELSE rr.audit_status END AS audit_status, CASE a.status WHEN 'RESCUED_PENDING_REVIEW' THEN '待审核救助' WHEN 'UNDER_RESCUE' THEN '救助中' WHEN 'RESCUE_REJECTED' THEN '救助驳回' WHEN 'OPEN_FOR_ADOPTION' THEN '开放领养中' WHEN 'APPLICATION_REVIEW' THEN '领养申请审核中' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '领养审核通过' WHEN 'FOLLOWUP_PENDING' THEN '待回访' WHEN 'ADOPTION_COMPLETED' THEN '领养完成' WHEN 'FOLLOWUP_EXCEPTION' THEN '回访异常' WHEN 'RETURNED_TO_CENTER' THEN '退养返站' ELSE a.status END AS status, rr.found_location, rr.found_time, rr.audit_remark FROM rescue_record rr LEFT JOIN animal a ON a.id = rr.animal_id WHERE rr.volunteer_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC

SELECT aa.id, a.name AS animalName, a.id AS animalId, a.cover_image, aa.apply_reason, aa.housing_info, aa.family_info, aa.pet_experience, aa.status AS rawStatus, CASE aa.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' WHEN 'SUPPLEMENT' THEN '待补充资料' ELSE aa.status END AS status, aa.audit_remark, aa.create_time FROM adoption_application aa LEFT JOIN animal a ON a.id = aa.animal_id WHERE aa.applicant_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY aa.create_time DESC
